description_long: This is an ornate, three-armed candelabrum with a classic, antique design, featuring a central vertical stem and two gracefully curved side arms. Each arm and the central stem holds a white, cylindrical candle, all of which are unlit and show no visible flame. The holder is made of a metallic material, likely brass or bronze, with decorative detailing around the candle cups and a broad, round base for stability. The surface of the metal has a slightly aged, patinated finish, giving it a vintage appearance. The candles themselves are smooth and unblemished, with no visible wax drips or burn marks. This object is typically used as a decorative centerpiece in formal urban settings such as restaurants, event halls, or upscale outdoor patios.
description: A vintage, three-armed metal candelabrum with white candles, featuring ornate detailing and a broad, round base. The candles are unlit and the holder has an antique, patinated finish.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all three candle arms and the ornate detailing on the central stem and base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the candelabrum's depth, with only the central candle and one arm visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing all three arms and the symmetrical design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the candelabrum's depth with the central candle and one arm visible.
